steps.title: Identify the key requirement
steps.content: The task asks to “present the study's results.” This means stating the findings—what the study discovered.

steps.title: Match the findings to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly states what the study found: macaques called out and gestured more frequently at humans holding food than at empty-handed humans. The other three provide background, hypothesis, or methodology rather than results. That matches choice A — A is correct.
